current_phase: Phase 3 complete. Phase 4 (Live Swarm + Kafka status panels + NodeMap + alerting) is next per ROADMAP, but significant Phase 4-6 work already implemented ahead of roadmap (collectors, alerts, Elasticsearch tools, memory hooks, dashboard endpoints).

existing_tools.working_tools: All 55 tools compile and have real implementations. Infrastructure tools return errors when target service unreachable (by design).
tool_signature_bugs: audit_log: missing optional target= and details= params
discover_environment: breaks on no-arg call (LLM can't pass empty)
skill_execute: description confuses LLM on how to pass kwargs
node_drain/node_activate: expect hex node ID but LLM passes hostname

tool_routing.mcp_layer: server.py: 55 @mcp.tool() wrappers, each a direct import call (e.g., return swarm.service_upgrade(name, image)). Promoted skills loaded dynamically at startup via _make_promoted_tool() closure.
tool_routing.api_layer: api/tool_registry.py: AST-based auto-discovery of mcp_server/tools/*.py. load_registry() extracts function names + docstrings + param types. invoke_tool(name, params) dynamically imports and calls. This is how the agent loop calls tools (not via MCP protocol).
tool_routing.agent_layer: api/agents/router.py: 4 agent types (observe, investigate, execute, build) with exclusive tool allowlists. Promoted skills injected into domain allowlists at startup.

agent_types.observe: Read-only: swarm_status, service_health, elastic_cluster_health, etc. Max 8 steps.
agent_types.investigate: Read-only + log search + correlation + ingestion. Max 12 steps.
agent_types.execute: Domain-filtered destructive tools (kafka/swarm/proxmox/general subsets). Max 20 steps.
agent_types.build: Skill management only (skill_create, skill_regenerate, etc.). Max 15 steps.

rules: kafka_rolling_restart: all brokers up? ISR >= RF-1?
swarm_service_upgrade: quorum maintained? majority managers up?
changelog_check: changelog ingested? breaking changes present?

pre_upgrade_check.description: Sequential gate: (1) Swarm nodes ready, (2) Kafka ISR intact, (3) Elastic errors=0 (30min), (4) Error rate anomaly (24h), (5) Memory context activation (past failures), (6) Checkpoint save

post_upgrade_verify.description: After 20s delay: (1) Replicas at desired count, (2) No new Elastic errors (5min), (3) Log correlation, (4) Store result as MuninnDB engram

plan_lock.description: Global singleton — ONE destructive plan at a time. 10-min stale timeout. Pre-flight enforcement: destructive tools blocked until plan_action() called. GUI confirmation flow: broadcast → wait_for_confirmation → release.

escalation_triggers: Tool returns degraded/failed/escalated → auto-escalate with memory context
Service vendor mismatch in service_upgrade() → fail with escalation
Memory trigger: repeated error pattern → critical alert
safety_layer.vendor_switch_guard: service_upgrade() blocks vendor changes unless task_hint contains 'switch image', 'change vendor', or 'migrate to'

agent_loop.flow: POST /api/agent/run → classify task → detect domain → build_step_plan (1-2 steps) → filter tools → inject memory → execute steps with pre-flight safety, lock checks, memory hooks, auto-escalation
agent_loop.step_orchestrator: api/agents/orchestrator.py: decomposes complex tasks into observe-then-execute steps. verdict_from_text() extracts GO/ASK/HALT between steps.
agent_loop.clarification: api/clarification.py: Agent calls clarifying_question() → GUI widget → 300s timeout → 'proceed with best guess'
agent_loop.confirmation: api/confirmation.py: wait_for_confirmation() blocks agent until GUI user approves plan

collectors.manager: api/collectors/manager.py: auto-discovers BaseCollector subclasses, starts as asyncio background tasks
collectors.base: api/collectors/base.py: poll() returns state dict → log_status_snapshot() → check_transition() (alerts) → evaluate_triggers() (memory hooks)

logger.pattern: Async batch-buffered: queue → flush every 100ms or 10 items. Operation start/complete are immediate writes. Tool calls, snapshots, escalations, audit are batched.

correlator.description: Links PostgreSQL operations ↔ Elasticsearch logs. Time-window matching (300s default, 30s per tool call). Anomaly detection. Memory activation.

alerts.description: In-memory ring buffer (200 entries). Health state transitions → warning/critical/info. ElasticAlerter (api/elastic_alerter.py) for log-derived alerts. Memory-triggered alerts for repeated error patterns.

websocket.description: JWT-authenticated (/ws/output?token=<jwt>). broadcast() → all clients + DB store. send_line() typed: step, tool, reasoning, halt, done, error. Session replay via get_replay().

session_store.description: Background flush every 0.2s to operation_log table. Enables GUI session replay.

skill_generation.pipeline: description → LLM → SKILL_SPEC (JSON) → live_validator (probe real endpoint) → generate_code_from_spec → validator.py (AST) → save to modules/ → register in DB
skill_generation.last_successful_generation: Three built-in skills (proxmox_vm_status, fortigate_system_status, http_health_check). Pipeline complete but no auto-generated skills yet.
known_issues: Depends on LM Studio (Qwen3-Coder-30B) being reachable for local generation
Export backend saves prompts only, no code generation

modules.client.py: MuninnDB REST client (engram CRUD, concept activation)
modules.ingest.py: Startup runbook ingestion (Swarm, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Filebeat) as engrams
modules.hooks.py: Before/after tool call hooks, memory context injection into agent
modules.triggers.py: Semantic trigger evaluation (e.g., Kafka lag > threshold → activate)
modules.feedback.py: Outcome + association engrams, Hebbian reinforcement (success stored 2x)
modules.schemas.py: Data schemas for engrams and docs

self_improvement_loop: Before tool call: activate relevant engrams → inject into agent context
After tool call: store execution context in MuninnDB
On completion: store outcome engram (task → tools → status)
On success: store tool association TWICE (Hebbian reinforcement)
On failure: store once with 'failure' tag
User thumbs-up: golden engram; thumbs-down: just log
Repeated error patterns: fire critical alert
rag_and_memory.doc_retrieval_py_status: functional — Multi-strategy retrieval, 60+ service keywords, graceful fallback if MuninnDB unavailable
rag_and_memory.knowledge_base_py_status: functional — Version tracking, compat checking, changelog parsing, vendor doc URLs
rag_and_memory.docs_currently_indexed: none — MuninnDB container must be running

infrastructure.database_backend: sqlite (default, auto-detects PostgreSQL if DATABASE_URL set)
swarm_services: agent (single replica, 1G memory, 2 CPU limit, overlay network)

settings.mechanism: DB-backed with env var seeding on first startup. Sync DB → os.environ so collectors pick up changes.

tabs_implemented: Dashboard — 6 status cards (Nodes, Brokers, Services, Elastic, Muninn, Summary)
Cluster — NodeMap visual grid (3 managers + 3 workers) with Kafka broker placement
Commands — Agent prompt execution with tool/skill picker, live feedback
Skills — Skill browser with execution forms, promote/demote
Logs — 5 sub-tabs: Live Logs, Tool Calls, Operations, Escalations, Stats
Memory — MuninnDB engram browser, patterns, doc fetching, engram activation
Tests (dropdown) — Integration test runner with pass/fail
Ingest (dropdown) — Document ingestion with preview and breaking changes

api_database.engine: SQLAlchemy (asyncpg for Postgres, aiosqlite for SQLite)
tables: operations — agent sessions (session_id, label, status, duration, final_answer)
tool_calls — per-tool execution log (operation FK, params, result, duration, model)
operation_log — WebSocket line store for session replay

skills_database.engine: Direct psycopg2 (Postgres) or sqlite3 (SQLite) via auto_detect.py
tables: service_catalog — detected versions, docs ingested flags

kafka.notes: 6 tools. Native kafka-python, not HTTP fingerprinted.

ansible.notes: Router exists (api/routers/ansible.py) but no MCP tools.

dead_code: mcp_server/tools/skill_meta_tools.py — legacy wrapper, not imported in server.py
./doc_retrieval.py — stale copy at project root, outside package
missing_files: agent_settings.json — referenced in CLAUDE.md but does not exist in codebase
blockers_and_gaps: CRITICAL: Operations never complete — agent.py enqueues complete_operation but background task exits before 100ms flush window, DB status stays 'running'. Fix: add flush_now() before complete_operation (documented in HANDOFF.md).
CRITICAL: stop_agent only sets cancel flag, doesn't update DB status — cancelled ops stay 'running' forever.
BUG: audit_log tool missing optional target= and details= params in server.py signature.
BUG: discover_environment breaks on no-arg call (LLM can't call without args).
BUG: skill_execute description confuses LLM on how to pass kwargs.
BUG: node_drain/node_activate expect hex node ID but LLM passes hostname.
INFRA: MuninnDB not running — memory, ingest, RAG, triggers, feedback all non-functional.
COVERAGE: Only 3 skill modules exist despite 16 fingerprinted services.
COVERAGE: 16+ of 25 listed platforms have zero tools.
DEAD CODE: 2 unused files (skill_meta_tools.py, root doc_retrieval.py).
MISSING: agent_settings.json referenced in CLAUDE.md doesn't exist.
NO scheduled task support (no cron, no APScheduler, no Celery).
NO rate limiting on tool calls.
recommendations: 1. Fix operation completion bug (flush_now before complete_operation) — #1 blocker for reliable agent operations.
2. Fix stop_agent to update DB status on cancellation.
3. Fix 4 tool signature bugs (audit_log, discover_environment, skill_execute, node_drain/activate).
4. Get MuninnDB running — unlocks Phase 5 (memory + RAG), GUI Memory tab already built.
5. Fix failing test (test_collectors_proxmox_vms.py stale patch target).
7. Generate TrueNAS skill module — validates auto-generation pipeline end-to-end.
8. Connect to live infrastructure (set env vars for Proxmox, FortiGate, Kafka, Elasticsearch).
9. Add fingerprints for missing platforms (NetBox, Wazuh, Security Onion, PBS, Technitium, Syncthing).
10. Generate skills for already-fingerprinted services (Pi-hole, UniFi, Traefik, Grafana, Portainer, etc.).
